subway_platform.name: Subway Platform
subway_platform.description:
An abandoned subway platform bathed in flickering emergency lighting.
Graffiti covers the walls and the air smells of rust and stale water.
A strange symbol stands out from the rest, it looks like a stick with three branches on the left, and two on the right.

maintenance_tunnel.name: Maintenance Tunnel
maintenance_tunnel.description:
A low-ceilinged tunnel running parallel to the subway tracks.
Pipes line the walls, some leaking a dark fluid. The hum of electricity is constant.

enemy.name: Pixie
enemy.description: A small winged demon with a mischievous grin. Don't let the size fool you.

sewer.name: Sewer
sewer.description:
A flooded sewer tunnel knee-deep in black water.
The stench is overwhelming. Something large brushes against your leg.
You're pretty sure you need new pants...

enemy.name: Slime
enemy.description: A pulsating mass of corrupted ooze. It absorbs damage and dissolves flesh.

flooded_concourse.name: Flooded Concourse
flooded_concourse.description:
The main concourse of the station, now ankle-deep in murky water.
Ticket booths stand empty, their screens displaying corrupted occult symbols.
Multiple passages lead deeper into the dark.

server_room.name: Server Room
server_room.description:
Banks of servers still hum with power, their indicator lights blinking in eerie patterns.
Cables snake across the floor like veins. A terminal displays a single line of text:
'GATE INTEGRITY FALLING...77%.'

enemy.name: Jack Frost
enemy.description: A snowman-like demon with a manic grin. It screams 'Hee-ho!' as it charges.

power_grid.name: Power Grid
power_grid.description:
A massive electrical substation repurposed for something...you can't quite comprehend.
Pentagrammic circuits are etched into the transformer casings.
The air tastes of ozone and burnt offerings.

enemy.name: Pyro Jack
enemy.description: A pumpkin-headed demon carrying a blazing lantern. The flames cast no shadow.

ritual_corridor.name: Ritual Corridor
ritual_corridor.description:
A long corridor lined with chalk circles and diagrams.
Candles burn at intervals but no wax drips.
The walls seem to breathe.

enemy.name: Oni
enemy.description: A hulking red demon with metal horns and a spiked club. It smells of iron...

summoning_chamber.name: Summoning Chamber
summoning_chamber.description:
The heart of the ritual. A massive summoning circle dominates the floor, still glowing faintly.
In the center, resting on a stone altar, is an ornate carving.
The silence here is absolute, you can't even hear your own footsteps.

morgue.name: Morgue
morgue.description:
Steel drawers line the walls, most hanging open and empty, some not...
A medical chart covered in some unknown script hangs from a hook.
One drawer is scratching from the inside.

enemy.name: Ghoul
enemy.description: A pale, gaunt figure that moves on all fours. Its jaw unhinges as it hisses.

collapsed_passage.name: Collapsed Passage
collapsed_passage.description:
A section of tunnel that partially caved in, leaving a narrow crawlspace.
Rusted rebar juts from the concrete. A duffel bag is wedged in the rubble.

hidden_cache.name: Hidden Cache
hidden_cache.description:
A small alcove someone used as a stash, maybe a prepper, probably a cultist.
Shelves of supplies line the walls. A handwritten note reads:
'If you find this, I'll find you.'

derelict_car.name: Derelict Subway Car
derelict_car.description:
An old subway car, derailed and wedged sideways in the tunnel.
Seats are overturned, windows are shattered, and old newspapers litter the floor.
The headlines all reference the same thing...your name.

enemy.name: Shadow
enemy.description: A being of pitch darkness wearing a human shape. Looking at its face makes your head hurt.

manufacturing_room.name: Manufacturing Room
manufacturing_room.description: An old industrial space repurposed into something nightmarish.

enemy.name: Garuda
enemy.description: A mechanical bird demon fused with industrial parts. Its wings are razor sharp.

velvet_room.name: Velvet Room
velvet_room.description:
You step through a door that shouldn't exist into a long, velvet-lined elevator
that appears to be moving between floors that have no end.
An old man in a white suit smiles at you.
'Welcome to my humble abode. Between dream and reality, your power waits.'

civvie_11.name: Civvie 11's Safe Room
civvie_11.description:
A concrete bunker plastered with tactical maps and sticky notes.
A camera on a tripod points at an empty chair. A note taped to it reads:
'Gone to find the boss. Probably died. 5/7.'

processing_room.name: Processing Room
processing_room.description:
A sterile white room stained with things that aren't white anymore.
Filing cabinets overflow with documents in a language that shifts when you look directly at it.

enemy.name: Nue
enemy.description: A chimeric demon — tiger's paws, monkey's head, tanuki's body. It crackles with a dark lightning.

occult_lab.name: Occult Laboratory
occult_lab.description:
A laboratory with glass tanks lining the walls, something keeps twitching inside one of them.
A researcher's journal lies open on the desk.

throne_approach.name: Throne Approach
throne_approach.description:
A grand corridor leading to an ancient throne. The walls are carved obsidian.
Torches burn and flicker with cold flame.
A massive locked door stands before you, with an indent shaped like [Not sure yet].

demon_throne.name: Demon Throne
demon_throne.description:
A room of black stone, looking at any one spot too long makes you feel unbalanced.
At its center, upon a throne of sinew and bone, sits Eligor.
A demon knight beside a spectral horse, holding a lance that drips with cold fire.
It turns its gaze upon you. 'You have come far, mortal. Further than most.' 
'But not all...'.

enemy.name: Eligor
enemy.description: A great duke of Hell. A knight upon a ghostly steed, wielder of the Spear of Longinus.
